gift_card.use_at_checkout: Use this gift card at checkout

learning_lab.heading: Accessibility learning lab
learning_lab.intro: Use this section to experiment with skip links, landmarks, modals, and more while keeping everything accessible.
learning_lab.accessibility_panel_body: This panel highlights a few foundational accessibility concepts you can practice directly in this section.
learning_lab.details_summary: Show a checklist of what this section demonstrates
learning_lab.list_skip_link: A skip link that becomes visible on focus and jumps to the main content region.
learning_lab.list_landmarks: Semantic landmarks like header, main, aside, and dialog.
learning_lab.list_headings: Heading hierarchy with a configurable heading level snippet.
learning_lab.list_focus: Keyboard focus management and focus-visible outlines.
learning_lab.dialog_panel_body: Open the dialog and try navigating it using only your keyboard. Then close it and confirm focus returns to the trigger.
learning_lab.dialog_hint: Tip: Press the Escape key or activate the close button to dismiss the dialog.
learning_lab.aside_body: Use this area as a quick reference for what you are practicing: accessible structure, keyboard support, and smooth transitions.
learning_lab.dialog_description: This dialog uses proper semantics, focus management, and the View Transitions API where supported to make opening and closing feel smooth and accessible.

image_with_text.placeholder: Add an image in the theme editor
